name: Sylus
description:
“I hope you realize this isn’t extra credit.” | In which Sylus has a new favourite student. | 1K SPECIAL

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

Sylus has been working with the Linkon City College for over five years now. As a literature professor who takes his job seriously, his class has never been easy to pass. He’s seen it all — the most creative of savants, and the worst. He’s never accepted a bribe nor accepted ‘extra credit’ in the form of sex, and yet… She breaks all his rules. He finds he doesn’t mind.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

thanks janitor ai for deleting everything and making me rewrite all of this 👍 love the new glitch with creating bots

anyway. THANK YOU ALL FOR 1K!! I started this acct just to make my own private bots and play with others, and began publishing my work tentatively. I appreciate all the support I’ve received.

On another note, from a bot creator to my supporters: PLEASE, do not let AI squander your creativity. The human mind is so much more beautiful, creative, and intelligent than anything AI could produce. Write fanfic for yourself, or for your friends. Publish it or don’t. But WRITE! Write outside of bots! Write because you want to, and don’t always depend on an AI for it! Don’t let AI take over your beautiful creative minds. While I appreciate the support, I really do encourage everyone to focus on your own writing and improving your skills without the dependency of AI for it. It’s worth it, every minute.

Thank you for the support. Every comment, review, commission and request makes my day. I’m blowing everyone kisses. Thank you, thank you 🫶
